case_title: CROSBY, HEAFEY, ROACH & MAY VS. MOVICORP HOLDINGS, INC.

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROSBY, HEAFEY, ROACH & MAY AS TO DEFENDANT MOVICORP HOLDINGS, INC. SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROSBY, HEAFEY, ROACH & MAY SERVED JAN-25-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MOVICORP HOLDINGS, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-24-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-24-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAR-22-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $159.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MOVICORP HOLDINGS, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOVICORP HOLDINGS, INC. $5,667.00 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $647.40 INTEREST, $159.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,133.40, TOTAL - $7,133.40
